title: acaena pinnatifida var. calcitrapa
intro: Acaena pinnatifida var. calcitrapa, also known as the New Zealand thimbleberry or red button, is a perennial plant native to New Zealand and Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acaena pinnatifida var. calcitrapa include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary problems. Acaena pinnatifida var. calcitrapa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and has also been used in traditional Maori medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
